text: 1g of carbs. and that is basically the whole nutrition story.

pros first: can be a clean hydration tool because especially compared with sugary sports drinks, this is a better functional option. context tells the real story because that is the whole point of misc. use case can matter more than macros because this category is really about function and trade-offs.

the drawbacks next: most people do not need it constantly because useful tool, but not an everyday necessity. not a whole-food nutrition star because most misc items are weak on raw nutrient profile. rarely deserves to be treated as a foundation food because most of these are situational, not core nutrition plays.
B tier. Best treated as a context item rather than a nutritional cornerstone.
